tool.name: sast_engine
tool.description: Static Application Security Testing (SAST) engine for code analysis.
tool.details: Common Use Cases: - Detect SQL injection vulnerabilities in code - Find command injection vulnerabilities - Detect hardcoded secrets and credentials - Find insecure cryptography usage - Detect XXE, SSRF, deserialization vulnerabilities

parameter.name: action
parameter.description: The SAST action: - scan_code: Scan provided code content - scan_file: Scan a file (requires filename) - list_rules: List all available detection rules

parameter.name: code
parameter.description: Code content to scan. Required for scan_code.

parameter.name: filename
parameter.description: Path to file to scan. Required for scan_file.

returns.description: Scan results including vulnerabilities found with severity and location

tool.examples:
# Scan code content
scan_code import os; os.system(user_input)
# Scan a file
scan_file /path/to/file.py
# List available rules
list_rules
